title: lasianthus foetidissimus
intro: Lasianthus foetidissimus, also known as the "stinking lasi anthus", is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Lasianthus foetidissimus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are often used to treat various ailments.
